name: Chinesey Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tips from chicken wings and reserve for another use.
2. Cut remaining wing in half at the joint.
3. Rinse chicken and pat dry. Set in an ungreased, shallow baking pan in a single layer.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Mix together in a small jar the remaining ingredients; cover and shake well.
6. Pour over wings. Cover pan with foil.
7. Bake for 2 hours at 325 degrees.
8. Remove foil, reduce heat to 300 degrees and continue baking another 30 minutes, basting wings with drippings every 10 minutes.
9. When wings are brown, remove and drain on paper towels. Serve hot or cold.
